loading_tips: 📈 Every tracked expense is a step toward financial control
🧠 Knowledge is power, especially in finance

proyecciones.title: 🔮 Financial Projections
proyecciones.no_data: Not enough historical data to generate projections.
proyecciones.no_data_hint: Add at least 3 months of movements to activate predictions.
proyecciones.confidence_explanation: Confidence is based on R² (coefficient of determination) from linear regression. A high value indicates historical data follows a predictable pattern.
proyecciones.current_year_avg_explanation: Current year average salary is calculated as the monthly average projected by the model based on historical trends.
proyecciones.investment_calc_explanation: Investments are projected by applying the average savings rate ({rate}%) to projected income, adjusted for historical savings trends.
proyecciones.no_insights: Accumulate more data to generate automatic insights.
proyecciones.current_year_note: ℹ️ **Year {year}**: The monthly average shows the ACTUAL average of {historical_months} elapsed month(s). The annual total combines actual data + projection for the remaining {projected_months} months.

income_trend_positive.title: Positive Income Trend
income_trend_positive.message: Your income is growing ~{increase}€/year. Projection based on {months} months of data. Model confidence: {confidence}%.

income_trend_negative.title: Alert: Income Decreasing
income_trend_negative.message: A drop of ~{decrease}€/year in your income is detected. Check for changes in your employment status or income sources.

income_trend_stable.title: Stable Income
income_trend_stable.message: Your income remains stable around {avg}€/month. No significant changes projected.

savings_rate_exceptional.title: Exceptional Savings Rate
savings_rate_exceptional.message: You invest {rate}% of your income. This puts you in the top tier of savers. At this pace, you will accumulate a substantial fund in 5 years.

savings_rate_excellent.title: Excellent Savings Rate
savings_rate_excellent.message: With a {rate}% investment/savings rate, you are building wealth solidly. Keep it up.

savings_rate_good.title: Good Savings Rate
savings_rate_good.message: You invest {rate}%. To reach the 20% target, you would need to increase by ~{deficit}pp more.

savings_rate_improvable.title: Improvable Savings Rate
savings_rate_improvable.message: You only invest/save {rate}% of your income. Review superfluous expenses to increase investments/savings.

savings_rate_none.title: No Investments/Savings Detected
savings_rate_none.message: No investments detected in your history. Consider allocating at least 10% of your income to savings/investment.

expense_yoy_increase.title: Year-over-Year Increase: {category}
expense_yoy_increase.message: {current_amount}€ vs {last_year_amount}€ same period last year ({yoy_pct}% more).

expense_growing.message: This category is growing by {pct}% monthly (avg: {avg}€/month). If the trend continues, it will double in ~{doubling_time} months.

expense_decreasing.title: Reduction in: {category}
expense_decreasing.message: You have reduced expenses in this category by {pct}% monthly. Good control!

expense_ratio_high.title: Very High Expenses
expense_ratio_high.message: Your expenses represent {ratio}% of your income. Very tight margin for unforeseen events.

expense_ratio_excellent.title: Excellent Expense Control
expense_ratio_excellent.message: You only spend {ratio}% of your income. Great savings capacity.

accumulating_data.title: Accumulating Data
accumulating_data.message: You have {entries} registered entries. With more historical data (3+ months), predictions will be more accurate.

proyecciones.btn_recalculate_help: Recalculates all projections with current data (without retraining saved models)

chat_search.title: 💬 Chat Search - Financial Assistant
chat_search.subtitle: Ask about your finances and get answers based on your real data
chat_search.input_placeholder: Type your question... E.g: How much did I spend on restaurants in 2025?
examples: How much did I spend on Mery's Christmas gift in 2025?
How much did I spend on alcohol in 2023?
What was my highest spending category last month?
Show me my biggest expenses this week
How much have I invested this year?
What is my average savings rate?
chat_search.llm_not_configured: ⚠️ LLM service is not configured. Go to Utilities > AI Configuration to enable it.
chat_search.no_messages: No messages yet. Ask your first question!

config.title: ⚙️ System Configuration
config.dark_mode_help: Enable dark theme across the application
config.enable_relevance_help: If disabled, fields and charts related to expense relevance classification will be hidden.
config.enable_retentions_help: If disabled, the system will not calculate or suggest investment/savings retentions (salary/remaining) during month closing.
config.enable_consequences_help: Activates the rule system to penalize specific expenses with additional investments/savings next month.
config.enable_llm_help: Activates automatic financial analysis with Artificial Intelligence using Ollama. Requires Ollama installed and a model downloaded.
config.llm_model_help: Choose the Ollama model to use. Larger models offer better quality but require more RAM and are slower.
config.llm_no_models: 📚 Download a model with: `ollama pull phi3` or `ollama pull tinyllama`
config.llm_not_running: 🚀 Install Ollama from https://ollama.com/download and make sure it's running.
config.ollama_no_models_warn: ⚠️ Ollama is running but no models are installed.
config.ollama_not_running_err: ❌ Ollama is not running or not installed
config.llm_model_import_title: **Model for Automatic File Load (Recommended: Medium/Heavy Models)**
config.section1_info: These values will be used as defaults in the month closing wizard.
config.bank_url_help: Link to your bank's website to have it handy in Ledger and Month Closing (e.g. https://bancosantander.es)
config.closing_method_label: When do you check your bank balance?
config.closing_method_help: Choose whether you check your balance before or after receiving salary when closing the month
config.section_auto_load_info: Configure duplicate filtering against the cluster (LEDGER) and the import time-window rule.
config.auto_dedup_enabled_help: When enabled, entries detected as already stored in LEDGER will be ignored.
config.auto_ignore_old_help: Discard movements not belonging to the current month.
config.auto_weight_note: Note: duplicate logic gives higher weight to exact amount and lower weight to text.
config.auto_formula_explanation:
**Formula (summary)**

`score = 0.75 * amount + 0.20 * date + 0.05 * text`

- `amount`: 1.0 for exact match, 0.85 within tolerance; then decreases.
- `date`: 1.0 inside the date window; outside, it decreases.
- `text`: fuzzy similarity between 0 and 1.

It is ignored as duplicate when it meets `minimum matching rules` and exceeds `minimum score`.

If enabled, *Ignore entries outside current period* discards movements not belonging to the current month.
config.slider_rem_help: Default value to retain from surplus balance
config.slider_sal_help: Default value to retain from salary
config.section2_info: These texts will be suggested when adding entries for each category.

notion.caption: **Import**: adds to app and removes from Notion. **Delete**: removes from Notion only. **Skip**: keeps in Notion (changes are saved).
notion.summary: 📊 **Summary**: {import_count} to import | {delete_count} to delete | {skip_count} to skip
notion.config_enable_help: Allows importing expenses/income from a Notion database
notion.config_info: 📱 Record your expenses on your phone in Notion and they will be automatically imported when you open PersAcc
notion.config_database_id_help: The 32-character ID of your Notion database (in the URL after notion.so/)
notion.config_check_startup_help: If active, will search for new entries in Notion every time you open PersAcc
notion.config_test_missing_fields: ⚠️ Enter the API Token and Database ID first
notion.config_how_to_content:
1. Go to [notion.so/my-integrations](https://www.notion.so/my-integrations)
2. Create a new internal integration
3. Copy the "Internal Integration Secret" (API Token)
4. Create a database in Notion with these columns:
   - **Concept** (Title)
   - **Amount** (Number)
   - **Type** (Select: Expense/Income/Investment)
   - **Category** (Text, optional)
   - **Date** (Date, optional)
5. Share the database with your integration
6. Copy the Database ID from the URL
